output.code:
# Load the uploaded text file and compute indices for quoted citations
import re, json, os, sys, textwrap, unicodedata, pathlib

path = "/mnt/data/file-8VA8tgCuVXLiqeg8ZW9KE8-Q012.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

text

# Find quoted segments and compute start/end indices excluding quotes
segments = []
for match in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text):
    start_quote = match.start()
    end_quote = match.end()
    inner_start = start_quote + 1  # exclude the starting quote
    inner_end = end_quote - 1      # exclude the ending quote
    inner_text = text[inner_start:inner_end]
    segments.append({
        "span_start": inner_start,
        "span_end": inner_end,
        "span_text": inner_text
    })

segments, len(segments)

queries: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا أَنَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ كَانَتَا رَتْقًا فَفَتَقْنَاهُمَا من أي سورة؟

What surah and verse is "أولم ير الذين كفروا أن السماوات والأرض كانتا رتقًا ففتقناهما"?

إن في الجسد مضغة إذا صلحت صلح الجسد كله وإذا فسدت فسد الجسد كله ألا وهي القلب رواه البخاري ومسلم

في قلوبهم مرض فزادهم الله مرضا ولهم عذاب أليم بما كانوا يكذبون البقرة 10
إن في الجسد مضغة إذا صلحت صلح الجسد كله وإذا فسدت فسد الجسد كله ألا وهي القلب صحيح البخاري
ألا وإن في الجسد مضغة إذا صلحت صلح الجسد كلههذا الحديث أين ورد؟
"إن في الجسد مضغة" رواه البخاري ومسلم
صحيح البخاري مضغة القلب إن في الجسد مضغة
ألا وإن في الجسد مضغة البخاري مسلم

# Re-verify exact substrings around quotes and check context
text[90:120], text[105:268], text[268:280], text[300:340], text[319:422], text[522:604]

for s in segments:
    print(s["span_start"], s["span_end"])
    # print char before and after to ensure
    before = text[s["span_start"]-1] if s["span_start"]>0 else ""
    after = text[s["span_end"]] if s["span_end"]<len(text) else ""
    print("Before:", before, "After:", after)
    print("Extracted:", text[s["span_start"]:s["span_end"]])
    print()

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":105,"span_end":268,"span_text":"أَوَلَمْ يَرَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا أَنَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ كَانَتَا رَتْقًا فَفَتَقْنَاهُمَا وَجَعَلْنَا مِنَ الْمَاءِ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ حَيٍّ أَفَلَا يُؤْمِنُونَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الأنبياء","sura_number":21,"aya_number":30},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"أَوَلَمْ يَرَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا أَنَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ كَانَتَا رَتْقًا فَفَتَقْنَاهُمَا ۖ وَجَعَلْنَا مِنَ الْمَاءِ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ حَيٍّ ۖ أَفَلَا يُؤْمِنُونَ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":319,"span_end":422,"span_text":"وَفِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ اللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْذِبُونَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"البقرة","sura_number":2,"aya_number":10},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ اللَّهُ مَرَضًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ بِمَا كَانُوا يَكْذِبُونَ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":523,"span_end":600,"span_text":"إن في الجسد مضغة إذا صلحت صلح الجسد كله وإذا فسدت فسد الجسد كله ألا وهي القلب","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih al-Bukhari","book_number":2,"hadith_number":45},"corrected_text":"ألا وإن في الجسد مضغة إذا صلحت صلح الجسد كله وإذا فسدت فسد الجسد كله ألا وهي القلب","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
